title: Obsidanum
description: Dungeons and adventures with new mobs. Uncover the mystery of the flame of the alchemist and cultist Bagel in one person!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f48e21368042e4c5e174a210936805ee8a0912a6.png)
_** This mod will tell you about the disappeared cult of the Secret Fire. Immerse yourself in dark adventures (which will soon be more pronounced in fashion), filled with mysteries and secrets of cultists. The mod will offer you an original look at obsidian tools, and indeed, at obsidian itself, it will no longer gather dust in chests. The mod also introduces one structure so far, with a very entertaining tablet that can replace bookshelves, saving space in your home.**_
![sreen1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f909225bccf84b6fa1ec556b7f91a8c1b977c6ce.png)

The mod introduces the game:
1. An alchemical substance that can only be purchased from a traveling merchant. She can grind any ore and, with a small chance, turn crying obsidian into an obsidian tear.
2. A structure with an ancient tablet that can be found in forests and plains.
3. An ancient tablet that can be retrieved (be careful, it may not be so easy) and charged with a tear to use it to make a spell table.
4. Obsidian tools that can be replaced with a blacksmith's table.
5. An obsidian alloy that can be made on a workbench.
6. Obsidian tools with special properties that are activated with the right mouse button.

What is planned in the next versions:
1. Introduction of achievements that will tell the player how to develop a mod.
2. Additional Cultist ruins (A desert version will be added soon).
3. New creature - Obsidian Elemental
4. Armor of the Order of the Secret Fire (most likely, they will only be found).
5. The special weapon of the Order.
6. Diaries and notes telling the player about the history of the Order in loot structures.
7. Expanding the fortress of the Lower World or adding new structures to the Lower World.

# Our other mods
